transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigator, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to know if a dermatologist near me is covered under my plan.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, I can check that. Can I get your name and date of birth to pull up your plan?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Lisa. I see you're on the Horizon Silver PPO plan. What's the provider's name?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Dr. Raymond Cole, at Sunset Skin Clinic.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: One moment... yes, Dr. Cole is listed as in-network under your plan.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Oh good, that's a relief. Will I still have a copay?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, a specialist visit copay of thirty dollars applies, same as your other specialist visits.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Perfect, that's all I needed to know. Thank you.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Lisa. Have a great day.
